headline: Betfred Player Lands £11.4 Million Mega Moolah Jackpot Win
subhead: The original Mega Moolah slot delivers its first eight-figure prize in recent months, paid out to a UK player at Betfred
metaTitle: Mega Moolah Jackpot Win: £11.4m at Betfred
metaDescription: A UK Betfred player has landed an £11,498,211.89 Mega Moolah jackpot win, the game's first eight-figure prize in recent months, Games Global confirms.
excerpt: A player in the United Kingdom has claimed an £11,498,211.89 Mega Moolah jackpot win at Betfred, marking the original Mega Moolah title's first eight-figure payout in recent months, according to provider Games Global.

paragraphs: A significant Mega Moolah jackpot win has been confirmed in the United Kingdom, with a Betfred player scooping a prize of GBP 11,498,211.89 on 12 June 2025. The win was recorded on the original Mega Moolah slot, the progressive jackpot title that first popularised the network's now-familiar four-tier jackpot structure.

According to a provider press release issued by Games Global in June 2025, this payout represents the first eight-figure Mega Moolah jackpot win recorded in recent months, underlining the scale that the game's progressive prize pool can reach when it is not triggered for an extended period.

sections.heading: Details of the Mega Moolah Jackpot Win
paragraphs: The jackpot was won by a player based in the United Kingdom playing through Betfred, one of the operators offering the Mega Moolah game within the Games Global network. The confirmed amount, GBP 11,498,211.89, was verified by Betfred and referenced in the Games Global announcement.

Mega Moolah, developed for the Games Global network, is widely known among UK players for its progressive jackpot mechanic, in which a small proportion of stakes placed across participating casinos contributes to a shared prize pool. That pool then pays out at random via a bonus wheel feature, meaning the eventual jackpot value depends on how long it has accumulated before being triggered.

Andy Booth, Chief Product Officer at Games Global, and Andrew Horne, Head of Gaming at Betfred, both issued statements marking the win, reflecting the significance of the payout for both the game provider and the operator through which it was claimed. Neither statement altered the core facts of the win: the amount, the date, or the game on which it landed.

Games Global noted in its release that the operator has awarded more than EUR 130 million in jackpot prizes across its network to date, a figure that includes Mega Moolah alongside other progressive titles it supplies to online casinos.

For players who follow progressive jackpot activity, this latest Mega Moolah jackpot win serves as a reminder of how these prize pools can grow over time between payouts, though the timing and value of any future jackpot trigger cannot be predicted or relied upon. Games Global has not disclosed further personal details about the winning player, and no additional information beyond the confirmed figures has been made available at the time of writing.
CasinoJackpots.io will continue to report on verified jackpot wins and prize-pool milestones as they are officially confirmed by operators and providers.

Gambling should always be treated as a form of entertainment rather than a way to make money. If you or someone you know is affected by gambling-related harm, free and confidential support is available from GamCare (gamcare.org.uk) and GambleAware (begambleaware.org). Gambling products referenced in this article are intended for adults aged 18 and over.
